name: Wandering Glimmer
projectTitle: Radon Exposure Estimation in a Basement in Fort Collins, Colorado
description: This tool estimates seasonal and annual radon exposure for basements in Fort Collins under two scenarios: typical (4 pCi/L) and higher observed (7.8 pCi/L). It requires user inputs for occupancy (hours per day spent in the basement) and mitigation measures (active fan, windows open). The outputs include seasonal and annual exposure estimates (pCi·h/L), a bar chart comparing exposures, and a health risk message for each scenario. Users should interpret the outputs as an order-of-magnitude guide: higher bars or “elevated risk” messages indicate homes where radon mitigation is strongly recommended, while lower exposures suggest lower relative risk.
